summary: Entry and exit seams are clean — no continuity edits needed. Ch13's evening (Dan's defeated stillness) transitions naturally to Ch14's morning (Mira's routine and decision to rebel). Ch14's evening (pasta, domesticity) transitions cleanly to Ch15's workday (Dan signing, Theo's fever). Shared details (refrigerator click, cracked cornice, headphones/sketchbook) echo consistently across boundaries. One internal prose-tic fix: removed a near-identical 'catalogued across fifteen years of marriage without ever deciding to' construction that duplicated a phrase 12 lines earlier.
edits: Removed duplicate 'catalogued across fifteen years of marriage without ever deciding to' clause from line 167 — same construction appeared on line 155; the surrounding sentence ('Her skin registered it before her mind could intervene') already conveys unconscious bodily knowledge without the redundant frame
